---
title: Mathematics 
subtitle: Guide Map of Blogs in Mathematics Section
description: |
  Rather than studying pure mathematics, I focus on studying and organizing mathematical concepts by filling out this mathematics blog section with some mathematics stuff for deep learning
categories:
  - Mathematics
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 03/01/2100
---

# Contents

## Basic

* 2023-03-23, [Variable types](./variables.qmd)
* 2023-03-14, [Harmonic Mean](./mean.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Function
  * 2023-01-31, [Function](./function/function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (1) - Univariable Scalar Function (One to One)](./function/univariable_scalar_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (2) - Multi-variable Scalar Function (Many to One)](./function/multivariable_scalar_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (3) - Univariable Vector Function (One to Many)](./function/univariable_vector_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (4) - Multi-variable Vector Function (Many to Many)](./function/mutivariable_vector_function.qmd)
  * 2023-02-18, [Function (5) - Composite Function](./function/composite_function.qmd)
  * 2026-03-23, [Function (6) - 함수의 합 vs 합성함수 — Sequential vs Joint 추정](./function/function_addition_vs_composition.qmd)
* 2023-02-18, [Transformations of Functions](./transformation.qmd)
* 2023-03-24, [Convex Combination](./convex_combination.qmd)
* 2023-03-18, [Higher Order Derivative](./2023-03-18_higher_order_derivative.qmd)
* 2023-03-15, [Minimizer & Minimum](./minimizer.qmd)
* 2023-03-15, [Taylor Series](./taylor_series.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Vector & Matrix
* 2023-03-14, [Limit, $\epsilon-\delta$ Method](./epsilon_delta.qmd)
* Differentiation
  * 2023-02-04, [Derivative (1) - Univariable Scalar Funtion](./2023-02-04_uni_derivative.qmd)
  * 2023-02-10, [Derivative (2) - Chain Rule & Partial Derivative](./2023-02-10_composite_partial_derivative.qmd)
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (3) - Higher Order Derivative
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (4) - Mean Value Theorem
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (5) - Gradient
* 2023-03-15, [Talyer's Series](./taylor_series/index.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Gradient Direction
* 1111-11-11, Random Variable
* 1111-11-11, Probability Distribution
* 1111-11-11, Information Theory - Entropy
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11,

## Linear Algebra

### 기초 개념 (Legacy Posts)

* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(1) - Vector Operations](./linear_algebra/01.basic_vector.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(2) - Vector Norm and Dot Product](./linear_algebra/02.norm_dot-product.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(3) - Vector Equation](./linear_algebra/03.vector_equation.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Matrix(1) - Matrix Operation](./linear_algebra/04.matrix_operations.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Matrix(2) - Matrix Multiplication](./linear_algebra/05.matrix_multiplication.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Matrix(3) - System of Linear Equations](./linear_algebra/06.system_of_lineqr_equations.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Matrix Calculus (1) - Matrix/Vector Derivatives](./linear_algebra/derivative_matrix_vector.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Matrix Calculus (2) - Vector/Matrix Derivatives](./linear_algebra/derivative_vector_matrix.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Matrix Transformation (5) - Quadratic Form, Linear Form, Bilinear Form](./linear_algebra/08.quadratic_form.qmd)
* 2023-03-31, [Special Matrix](./linear_algebra/09.special_matrix.qmd)
* 2023-04-10, [Vector Space](./linear_algebra/09.vector_space.qmd)
* 2023-06-02, [Multivariate Normal Distribution & Cholesky Decomposition](./linear_algebra/09.cholesky_decomposition.qmd)
* 2023-03-31, [Linear Transformation](./linear_algebra/10.linear_transformation.qmd)

### MIT 18.06 Linear Algebra (Gilbert Strang) 강의 시리즈

#### Ch.1 Introduction to Vectors

* 2026-04-06, [Ch.1 Overview — 선형결합, 내적, 코사인, 노름 종류](./linear_algebra/mit-01-1-gilbert-strang-vectors-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-06, [Ch.1 §1.1 — Vectors and Linear Combinations](./linear_algebra/mit-01-2-gilbert-strang-vectors-linear-combinations.qmd)
* 2026-03-09, [Lecture 1 — 선형 방정식의 기하학적 해석](./linear_algebra/mit-01-gilbert-strang-overview.qmd)

#### Ch.2 Solving Linear Equations

* 2026-03-10, [Lecture 2 — 소거법과 후방 대입](./linear_algebra/mit-02-gilbert-strang-elimination.qmd)
* 2026-03-11, [Lecture 3 — 행렬 곱셈과 역행렬](./linear_algebra/mit-03-gilbert-strang-multiplication.qmd)
* 2026-03-12, [Lecture 4 — A = LU 분해](./linear_algebra/mit-04-gilbert-strang-factorization.qmd)
* 2026-03-13, [Lecture 5 — 치환, 전치, 벡터 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-05-gilbert-strang-substitution.qmd)

#### Ch.3 Vector Spaces and Subspaces

* 2026-03-14, [Lecture 6 — 열 공간과 영 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-06-gilbert-strang-column-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-15, [Lecture 7 — Ax = 0: 피벗 변수와 특수해](./linear_algebra/mit-07-gilbert-strang-null-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-16, [Lecture 8 — Ax = b의 완전해](./linear_algebra/mit-08-gilbert-strang-row-reduced-form.qmd)
* 2026-03-17, [Lecture 9 — 선형 독립, 기저, 차원](./linear_algebra/mit-09-gilbert-strang-linear-independence.qmd)
* 2026-03-18, [Lecture 10 — 네 개의 근본 부분 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-10-gilbert-strang-subspaces.qmd)
* 2026-03-19, [Lecture 11 — 행렬 공간, 랭크 1 행렬, 그래프 입문](./linear_algebra/mit-11-gilbert-strang-matrix-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 12 — 그래프, 네트워크, 근접 행렬](./linear_algebra/mit-12-gilbert-strang-graph.qmd)

#### Ch.4 Orthogonality

* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 13 — 중간 리뷰](./linear_algebra/mit-13-gilbert-strang-mid-review.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 14 — 직교 벡터와 부분 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-14-gilbert-strang-orthogonal.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 15 — 사영(Projection)](./linear_algebra/mit-15-gilbert-strang-projection.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 16 — 사영 행렬과 최소 제곱](./linear_algebra/mit-16-gilbert-strang-projection-matrix.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 17 — Gram-Schmidt 직교화](./linear_algebra/mit-17-gilbert-strang-gram-schmidt.qmd)

#### Ch.5 Determinants

* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 18 — 행렬식의 성질](./linear_algebra/mit-18-gilbert-strang-determinant.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 19 — 행렬식 공식과 여인수](./linear_algebra/mit-19-gilbert-strang-determinant2.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 20 — 행렬식의 응용](./linear_algebra/mit-20-gilbert-strang-determinant3.qmd)

#### Ch.6 Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors

* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 21 — 고윳값과 고유벡터](./linear_algebra/mit-21-gilbert-strang-eigenvalue.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 22 — 대각화](./linear_algebra/mit-22-gilbert-strang-diagonalization.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 23 — 미분방정식과 행렬 지수 함수](./linear_algebra/mit-23-gilbert-strang-differentiation.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 24 — 마르코프 행렬과 정상 상태](./linear_algebra/mit-24-gilbert-strang-markov-matrix.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [Lecture 25 — 중간 리뷰 2](./linear_algebra/mit-25-gilbert-strang-mid-reviewe2.qmd)

#### 교재 기반 미작성 주제 (Strang, Introduction to Linear Algebra)

* 1111-11-11, Ch.7 — Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)
* 1111-11-11, Ch.8 — Linear Transformations
* 1111-11-11, Ch.9 — Complex Vectors and Matrices
* 1111-11-11, Ch.10 — Applications

## Graph Theory

* 2026-03-24, [그래프 이론 기초](./graph_theory/01.graph_theory_basics.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, 그래프 알고리즘 심화 (SCC, 위상 정렬, 최소 신장 트리)
* 1111-11-11, 그래프 임베딩 (Node2Vec, GNN)

## Optimization

* 2023-03-23, [Minimizer & Minimum](./optimization/minimizer.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Convex Set
* 1111-11-11, Convex Function
* 1111-11-11, Unconstrained Optimization
* 1111-11-11, Non-linear Least Square
* 1111-11-11, Largrange Multiplier Method
  * 1111-11-11, Largrange Primal Function
  * 1111-11-11, Largrange Dual Function
  * 1111-11-11, KKT conditions
* 1111-11-11, Gradient Descent Optimizers
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11,
